# workflows

## Purpose
GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow definitions.

## Key Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `release.yml` | Release pipeline — build, test, publish to npm |

## For AI Agents

### Working In This Directory
- Workflow syntax: GitHub Actions YAML
- Test changes locally with `act` if available
- Release workflow triggers on version tags
